title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Sobha Developers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!
